item.title: What Lies Beneath Raichur? GSD leads high-tech Heliborne mineral search in Karnataka
item.description:
<![CDATA[A heliborne mineral survey in Raichur, led by GSD, is scanning for rare earth minerals. (Image: X/@GSD)
Heliborne survey scans Raichur forests for rare minerals.
Preliminary data hints at possible rare earth deposits.
Survey aims to boost India's critical mineral independence. Did our AI summary help?
Helicopters were sweeping across Raichur’s forested horizons recently. The mission is scientific, not military or commercial. A heliborne mineral survey is currently underway. It focuses on Mal...]]>
item.author: Gurpreet Singh, Curated

item.title: Karnataka Hit-And-Run Case: 3 Men Killed After Motorcycle Is Hit By Truck In Raichur; Probe Underway
item.description:
<![CDATA[Karnataka Hit-And-Run Case: 3 Men Killed After Motorcycle Is Hit By Truck In Raichur; Probe Underway | Representational Image
Bengaluru: Three youths were killed in a hit-and-run accident in Raichur district of Karnataka, police said on Saturday.
The deceased have been identified as 24-year-old Mohammad Ali, 19-year-old Noor Mohammad, and 26-year-old M. Fayaz, all residents of Sukhani Colony in Raichur city.
Details Of The Accident
The accident occurred when their motorcycle was hit by a tru...]]>
